restoreWarning.title: Restore from Google Drive?
restoreWarning.body: The Google Drive backup contains {{backupCount}} transactions, but you have {{localCount}} locally.
restoreWarning.consequence: Continuing will replace your local data with the backup, and transactions not in the backup will be lost.

driveReconnect.title: Google Drive connection expired
driveReconnect.body: Your Google Drive access token has expired. Would you like to reconnect to continue syncing?

dialog.passwordPlaceholderRequired: Leave blank if you didn't use a password
